title: Compatibility matrix — ASS-ADE MCP + Cursor hooks (refine slice)

surfaces.backwardCompat: Adding afterFileEdit entries is additive; older Cursor ignores unknown keys. Removing a hook block is safe rollback.
surfaces.rollback: git restore hooks.json from last known-good commit; set ATOMADIC_SKIP_CONTEXT_PACK / ATOMADIC_SKIP_MCP_EVOLUTION_HINT as temporary bypass.

dependsOn: ass-ade stdio python -m ass_ade mcp serve
surfaces.backwardCompat: New MCP servers must not rename existing server ids without migration note in PR.
surfaces.rollback: Restore mcp.json; restart Cursor; verify tools/list for each server.

surfaces.backwardCompat: Golden tool trio + schema stability; distractor names must not appear as shipped tools.
surfaces.rollback: git restore mcp/server.json; re-run pytest tests/test_mcp_research_radar_fixture.py -q

dependsOn: ass-ade optimize Typer registration in cli.py
surfaces.backwardCompat: Subcommands are additive; default behavior is log-only under .ass-ade/aso/logs/.
surfaces.rollback: git restore src/ass_ade/commands/aso.py src/ass_ade/cli.py; remove .ass-ade/aso/logs/* if desired.

surfaces.backwardCompat: Weekly PRs only; disabling file removes automation without breaking builds.
surfaces.rollback: git restore .github/dependabot.yml; close open Dependabot PRs if undesired.

surfaces.backwardCompat: Schedule + workflow_dispatch only; no PR blocking until explicitly wired.
surfaces.rollback: git restore .github/workflows/security-audit.yml; delete workflow run history optional.

surfaces.backwardCompat: Job is skipped unless PR carries ass-ade-blueprint or ass-ade-feature label.
surfaces.rollback: git restore .github/workflows/pr-labeled-ass-ade.yml; remove labels from open PRs if undesired.
